summary: Iteration 172: Dormant Client Alert System + Assignment Reasoning Transparency testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: Dormant Clients page with owner breakdown cards, status tabs, table with actions (Reactivate works), Assignment Decisions page with engine filter and empty state, Orders page drawer with Assignment section, sidebar navigation entries present.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 63 clients (46 companies, 17 individuals) with 54 showing as dormant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 1 (Dormant Client Alert System) and Pack 2 (Assignment Reasoning Transparency) fully verified. Key findings: (1) GET /api/admin/dormant-clients/summary returns summary counts (at_risk=0, inactive=54, lost=0, active=9) with per-owner breakdown (Brian Kweka: 12, Janeth Msuya: 38, Neema Mallya: 4), (2) GET /api/admin/dormant-clients/alerts returns full list with status/owner filters working, (3) POST /api/admin/dormant-clients/{client_id}/reactivate marks clients as reactivated, (4) Staff endpoints (/api/staff/dormant-clients/mine and /summary) work for sales users, (5) Assignment regression tests pass: candidates preview, explain 404 for nonexistent, decisions returns array, (6) Frontend: DormantClientAlertsPage renders with owner cards, status tabs (All Dormant/At Risk/Inactive/Lost), table with actions (Open Client, Create Quote, Create Follow-up, Reactivate, Reassign), (7) AssignmentDecisionHistoryPage renders with engine filter dropdown and empty state (no decisions yet since no orders approved through stock-first engine), (8) OrdersPage drawer shows Assignment section with Sales Person and Vendor info, (9) Sidebar navigation entries for Dormant Alerts and Assignment Decisions are in Settings Hub module.

pack1_dormant_client_alerts.frontend_dormant_page: PASS - Owner cards, status tabs, table with actions all working
pack1_dormant_client_alerts.reactivate_button: PASS - Button clicks and API call succeeds
